rationale: For a US resident, the imminent US-Iran peace deal signing remains the dominant story — markets soaring and oil falling are real economic effects, but the deal is still unsigned rhetoric-stage; no new qualitative leap beyond last cycle.

top_events.title: US-Iran to sign a 'peace deal' on Friday; stock markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: Markets are already reacting positively to the imminent deal — lower oil prices and soaring stocks have real economic impact for US residents, but the deal remains unsigned this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump says leader of Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang killed in US strike
top_events.summary: Confirmed killing of a Tren de Aragua leader in a US strike is a domestic security action — continuation of established operations with no new qualitative escalation.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China on espionage charges — continuation of established pattern of US-China tensions; no new qualitative escalation this cycle.
